turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. Do you have a pharmacy inside the clinic? I don't want to go running around after consultation.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we have an in-house pharmacy on the ground floor. It stocks most commonly prescribed medications and is open from 8 AM to 9 PM all days including Sundays.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: And if a medicine is not available?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: If a specific medicine is not stocked, our pharmacist can either order it for same-day or next-day delivery, or suggest an equivalent available alternative — always in consultation with your doctor's prescription.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's very convenient. What about storing temperature-sensitive medicines like insulin?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we have cold chain storage for insulin and other temperature-sensitive medications. You can pick these up directly from our pharmacy.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Great, that answers everything. Thank you.
